title: Human Terrain & Statecraft

fields.vision: Consolidated handoff archive for the proposed MuranoOS Human Terrain & Statecraft room (internal doctrine: Motive-to-System Chamber).
fields.mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
fields.source_utilization: Discovery, creativity, systems thinking, and project generation. Use source library creativity/innovation/network sources to professionalize the project-development account. Vision: Explain Nexus and Personal OS as project-development and discovery infrastructure, not miscellaneous personal tooling. Mechanism: Extract creativity, network, learning, imagination, leadership, and project-generation mechanisms. Plan: Rewrite Nexus and planning pages around upstream/downstream project movement. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need exact project-method and creativity passages. Source pool: 151 deduplicated local title candidates; 154 catalogue support rows. Examples: Creativity Research; The Heritage, Creativity and Innovation Nexus. Intelligence tradecraft, counterintelligence, and analytic method. Use source library intelligence titles as method authority and intelligence-domain stressors. Vision: Present intelligence pages as disciplined analytic-method and tradecraft demonstrations. Mechanism: Tie claims to collection, covert action, deception, interrogation, bias-control, and analytic-logic mechanisms. Plan: Prioritize Capstone, SATS, CI, RAG integrity, and analyst-assurance pages for close-reading. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need method-passage extraction and claim-to-source linkage. Source pool: 60 deduplicated local title candidates; 63 catalogue support rows. Examples: Improving Intelligence Analysis; Leading Intelligence Analysis. source library scholarly-source routing with author correction. Raw filenames often append Nik_Murano and are not treated as authorship evidence. Catalogue rows are preferred for authors where available. This strengthens page...
fields.plan: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. Operator reading order: HTS_HANDOFF_REVIEW -> HTS_CANON_LIVE_PROPOSAL_DELTA_MAP -> READING_ORDER -> UPLOAD_PROMPT -> then through 01_HTS_Core_Spec -> 02 Implementation -> 03 Canon Seeds -> 04 World Design. Upstream Red Team reference consulted whenever authoritative precedent is needed for governed room architecture, repo-aware adaptation, live-repo alignment, persistence direction, or internal/public-safe separation. Wire or preserve the implementation files: No frontend/backend code. Implementation package is contract-level: Command Registry, Schema Seed SQL, File Change Map, UI Component Map. Upstream Red Team reference does include live_repo_current and live_repo_snapshot directories.
fields.remaining_gaps: Retain the packet as a completed authority layer, then decide whether it should remain a reference file or become a live room, method page, or public proof object.
fields.detailed_source_vision: Consolidated handoff archive for the proposed MuranoOS Human Terrain & Statecraft room (internal doctrine: Motive-to-System Chamber). Fuses four completed HTS tranches into one operator-facing archive with a final wrapper layer (front-door guidance, reading order, package maturity note, canon/live/proposal delta map, handoff review, integrity manifest, continuation upload prompt). Governing question: "How do motives, fears, needs, perceptions, capabilities, institutions, and structures generate behavior across scales?"
fields.detailed_source_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.

public_pitch.what_it_is: Consolidated handoff archive for the proposed MuranoOS Human Terrain & Statecraft room (internal doctrine: Motive-to-System Chamber).
public_pitch.distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
public_pitch.why_it_matters: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Human Terrain & Statecraft, so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.
public_pitch.pitch_integrity_note: Mechanism-first public pitch inserted after the Nexus Lab mechanism-erasure audit on 2026-05-13; source basis: blueprint detailed source fields.

pitch_integrity_audit.standard: object, distinctive mechanism, value, built state, and non-overclaim discipline must be visible.

researcher_process_map.final_use_case: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Human Terrain & Statecraft, so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.
